content: next-mdx-remote cannot process import/export statements inside MDX files, limiting in-MDX component definitions; its RSC integration is explicitly marked unstable. App Router requires a root mdx-components.tsx to supply components via a client-side MDX provider, or MDX content fails to render with a missing-use-client error. @next/mdx (compile-time, via next.config) supports import/export natively and integrates more cleanly with the App Router/RSC model than next-mdx-remote for content authored in-repo.
